title: YRT – Mana Backlash
description: Suffer a mana-specific backlash cost when magic goes wrong in the Yrt setting.

data.value: Seed detonates prematurely — Effect triggers at wrong time/place
Mana grain contamination — Impurities cause unpredictable effects
Reverse polarity — Effect inverts (heat→cold, attraction→repulsion)
Cascading failure — Nearby seeds in your bandolier are damaged or triggered
Mana burn — Physical scarring from raw mana exposure; mark the location
Costly waste — Seed consumes extra reserves; lose additional prepared seeds
Targeting error — Effect hits wrong target (friend, object, or self)
Containment breach — White/luminous shell fails; mana disperses wildly
Grain size failure — Wrong particle size causes sluggish or explosive delivery
Sensory overload — Mana feedback temporarily blinds, deafens, or numbs you
Uncontrolled dispersion — Effect spreads far beyond intended area
Mana poisoning — Endure Harm as raw mana sickens you
Resonance feedback — Nearby mana sources react unpredictably
Seed matrix fracture — Your casting focus is damaged
Environmental reaction — Surroundings respond to mana type
Color bleeding — Mana colors mix incorrectly; unexpected combined effect
Exhaustion — Casting drains you severely; Endure Stress or collapse
Delayed ignition — Effect triggers at worst possible moment later
Mana echo — Your location saturated with residual mana; easily tracked
Component destruction — Important item damaged by mana exposure
Compulsion backlash — Mental magic: confused, suggestible, or see illusions
Sympathetic link — Connected to target; share their pain/sensations
Mana addiction — Compelled to cast again immediately, despite danger
Attracts attention — Mana use draws hostile forces or authorities
Forbidden resonance — Black mana traces detected; risk Conclave investigation
Prophetic flash — Disturbing vision of consequence; Endure Stress
Mana drought — Cannot use this color again until you recharge at source
Crystallization — Mana solidifies incorrectly; creates hazard or barrier
Sympathetic damage — Someone you care about suffers echo of the effect
Lab incident — If near equipment: something valuable breaks or explodes
Mana scarring — Permanent mark or condition; describe how mana changed you
Threshold breach — Summon/attract entity drawn to mana
Catastrophic failure — Roll twice more; both occur. If same, make it worse
Forbidden knowledge — Glimpse terrible truth about mana's origin
